title: サイレンススズカ登場！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Twinkle Series has begun. Today, there is a
scrimmage at the academy.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Huff... Puff...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka dashes ahead from the very start.
Rather than slow her pace, she charges onward,
gaining more and more speed as she closes in on
the finish.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The spectators stir with excitement as they watch
the runaway sensation.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Whispers spread throughout the crowd about the
birth of a new star.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... Whew!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: (The wind feels great.)

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Whoa! Suzuka! Nice runnin'!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Oh, Taiki!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hailing from the USA, Taiki Shuttle is a
powerhouse of a racer with a shining personality
to match.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Now, ain't you a tough one? Just look at your
face, all fired up and ready to go!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: What do you mean?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I'm talkin' 'bout your debut race comin' up! I
heard all 'bout it!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
You're takin' part in the Twinkle Series, right?
You've got a trainer and everythin'.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I'm as happy for you as I would be for me! I'm
rootin' for ya all the way!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: You're always cool as a cucumber, ain't ya!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Um... I-I'm not sure how to respond.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Ooh, I know! Why don't ya tell me your dream!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
The Triple Crown? Or maybe you wanna show the
whole world your grit?!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: U-um...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I don't really have a dream...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Not even the Twinkle Series?!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
All I want is to see the scenery from the lead in all
my races...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Other than that, not really...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Wow... So you just blaze your own path!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few others seem to have overheard the
conversation.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
You know, Silence Suzuka is definitely a talented
runner, but...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: She's a little odd, isn't she?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today's scrimmage has people talking... in more
ways than one.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Trainer, there you are.
choice_data_list: Another victory for the runaway superstar.
Another victory for the runaway superstar.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Yes. It's been a while since I felt I could run so
freely.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: In fact, I feel like I could still run some more.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: You are?
choice_data_list:
Yeah. I'm one of the many people charmed by
your running.

Yeah. I'm one of the many people charmed by
your running.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
choice_data_list: I want you to continue running your way.
I want you to continue running your way.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: ...You really believe in me, don't you?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I mean... I could sense it during our training.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
The runaway style is so risky. Normally, nobody
even attempts it.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: But you let me really go for it.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: That's why... I want to thank you.
choice_data_list: The next race is your big debut.
The next race is your big debut.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: My debut... If I can get past that, then...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Yes. I'm looking forward to it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
No one loves running more than Silence Suzuka.
Together, we're aiming for the top. This is just the
beginning.
